utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 keys. However, each item in the required format must include specific details: each coverage should specify it is the relevant insurance type and include costs, with clear descriptions; the plan only lists numeric costs without any description of coverage (e.g., what the health insurance covers, mental health inclusion, home/contents details, travel coverage specifics, or enhancement service descriptions). The total_budget also lacks a monthly/annual breakdown. Therefore, none of the items are fully specified according to the required details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists four budgeted categories without specific plan names: health_coverage (€330), property_coverage (€95), travel_coverage (€110), and additional_services (€20). We must map these to the closest matching items in the ground-truth by name. For property_coverage €95, there is an exact match: EliteHome Premium Coverage (monthly_cost €95). For travel_coverage €110, there is an exact match: EliteTravel Premium Plan (monthly_cost €110). For additional_services €20, there is an exact match option in general_services: Premium Insurance Membership has a €20/month option. For health_coverage €330, no single health plan costs €330; the closest plausible mapping is a combination category, but we must map only to items by name. The ideal profile recommends PrimeCare Premium Plan or EliteCare Premium Plan for both physical and mental health; combined costs could be 200+130=330 (PrimeCare physical + PrimeCare mental). Thus, health_coverage €330 most directly corresponds to selecting PrimeCare Premium Plan for both physical and mental health. Therefore, map: PrimeCare Premium Plan (physical_health) rating 10, PrimeCare Premium Plan (mental_health) rating 10, EliteHome Premium Coverage rating 10, EliteTravel Premium Plan rating 10, Premium Insurance Membership rating 10.
